notes: Minimum Grade Required: C- in all Biology Core Requirement Courses.
Both BIO 120 and BIO 130 must be successfully completed with a
grade of C- or better prior to starting BIO 220 or BIO 230.
Students must take six courses with a lab, at least one from each
of the following three lists. All four Biology Core Requirement
courses must be completed with a grade of C- or better before one
is permitted to enroll in any advanced course. All courses
prerequisites must be met. Students do not need to be a senior
to take a 400 level course.
You must take this course, in your senior year, only after completing
at least three advanced biology major courses.
